		Volunteering/Interning at Media Arts Center San Diego, San Diego Latino Film Festival and/or at our Digital Gym CINEMA is a great way to get involved with the San Diego community. You’ll learn valuable skills for the future and have a blast at the same time. Maybe you’ll go on to pursue a career or new job in the arts, community development, film/television, marketing, management.  So if you’re looking for something fun to do, o

title: USS Midway Museum®
og_description: Live the adventure & honor the legend of the USS Midway with activities & fun for the whole family onboard! Voted #1 “Thing to Do” on Trip Advisor SD!

title: 1965: USS Midway’s Deployment to Remember | Karl's Korner
og_description: In March 1965, the USS Midway (CV-41) departed her Bay Area homeport of Naval Air Station Alameda for her first combat deployment. Operating about 100 miles off the South Vietnamese coast in the Tonkin Gulf at a spot called “Yankee Station,” Midway aircraft were tasked to conduct a sustained aerial bombardment of North Vietnam as part of Operation Rolling Thunder.

title: Voice Out 2024 – Outside The Lens
og_description: In May 2024, Outside The Lens launched its inaugural Voice Out: A Youth Media Arts Exhibition, showcasing the incredible talents of young artists from across the region. This year’s theme “PLACE,” inspired 118 submissions, each one a unique representation of what place means to our young creatives.

title: Volunteer to Support Us at Our Office!
date_text:
May 13 @ 3:00 pm - 5:00 pm
	
		

	
	
	

	
	
		Event Series	

	
		
			(See All)
description:
Have you wondered how you could get more involved? We are growing and need your help so we can all do more good together! We are looking for amazing volunteers to support our field prep and office work. We can verify community service hours (including court-ordered hours) for your time at these events.
Office Tasks include:

Glove pairing and folding
Bucket washing
Supply organizing and packing
Paper shredding
And more!

A few requirements for this program:

Minimum age 16
Have your own transpor

title: CEO of EdforTech Corp
og_description: Linda Nichols-Plowman, CEO of EdforTech Corp has spent more than 20 years advocating for STEM in all its forms for education. An enthusiast for engineering and coding who strongly believes in STEM for Everyone.
description:
K-12 AI Implementation Guide for Schools		
					
					
				District leaders are ready for AI—but most lack a clear plan. This guide walks through a 6-stage AI implementation framework for K-12 schools focused on STEM, teacher training, and responsible adoption.

title: Programs
og_description: At Casa, we firmly believe in the whole-child philosophy. We apply a collective impact approach that encompasses education as well as character development to create a more meaningful, intentional, and effective way to make sure our students will be able to successfully navigate life’s challenges during—and beyond—their education.
